h1: Centipede & Millipede Control in NYC — Dry Out, Clear Out
heroParagraph: Centipedes in NYC apartments signal a moisture and insect prey problem. They feed on other insects — so heavy centipede activity means there's a larger pest population supporting them. Our centipede control program addresses both the centipedes and their prey insects, combined with moisture reduction recommendations to make your property inhospitable to both.
